DRAFT
  • API Reference
  • foregrounds module
  • View page source

foregrounds module

Models for extragalactic foregrounds (radio, CIB, tSZ, kSZ; based on SPT measurements from George et al. 2015 and Reichardt et al. 2020) and Galactic foregrounds (dust and synchrotron from pySM3 simulations).
